zh.lifeSummary: 當Philip de Orreby II於1190年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾艾爾福德時，他的父親Philip de Orreby I30歲，母親Emma de Coventry25歲。他於1217年與Leuca de Mohaut在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾諾斯 奧姆斯比結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1230年在他的家鄉享年40歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾艾爾福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Philip de Orreby II于1190年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾艾爾福德时，他的父亲Philip de Orreby I30岁，母亲Emma de Coventry25岁。他于1217年与Leuca de Mohaut在英国英格兰林可爾史爾諾斯 奧姆斯比结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1230年在他的家乡享年40岁，埋葬在英国英格兰斯塔福爾艾爾福德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Orreby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Orry
meanings: English: variant of   Orrey  ;  see  Urry  .

nameMeanings.name: Philip
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Philippos, meaning ‘lover of horses’, from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’. This was popular in the classical period and since. It was the name of the father of Alexander the Great . It was also the name of one of Christ's apostles, of a deacon ordained by the apostles after the death of Christ, and of several other early saints. See also Philippa .

en.lifeSummary: When Philip de Orreby II was born in 1190, in Elford, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Philip de Orreby I, was 30 and his mother, Emma de Coventry, was 25. He married Leuca de Mohaut in 1217, in North Ormsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1230, in his hometown, at the age of 40, and was buried in Elford, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philip de Orreby II est né en 1190, à Elford, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Philip de Orreby I, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Emma de Coventry, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Leuca de Mohaut en 1217, à North Ormsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1230, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterré à Elford, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Philip de Orreby II 1190 in Elford, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Philip de Orreby I 30 und seine Mutter Emma de Coventry 25. Er hat 1217 in North Ormsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Leuca de Mohaut geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1230 im Alter von 40 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Elford, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Philip de Orreby II è nato il nel 1190 nel Elford, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Philip de Orreby I, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Emma de Coventry, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Leuca de Mohaut nel 1217, nel North Ormsby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1230, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolto a Elford, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Philip de Orreby IIが1190年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアエルフォードで生まれた時，父Philip de Orreby Iは30歳，母Emma de Coventryは25歳であった。1217年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアノース オルムスビーでLeuca de Mohautと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1230年に故郷で40歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアエルフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Philip de Orreby II(이)가 1190년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 엘퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Philip de Orreby I(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma de Coventry(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1217년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 노르스 오스비에서 Leuca de Mohaut(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1230년 그의 고향에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 엘퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Philip de Orreby II nasceu em 1190, em Elford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Philip de Orreby I, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Emma de Coventry, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Leuca de Mohaut em 1217, em North Ormsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philip de Orreby II родился в 1190 г. в местности элфорд, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Philip de Orreby I было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma de Coventry, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Leuca de Mohaut в 1217 г. в местности норт ормсби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1230 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 40 лет и был похоронен в местности элфорд, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Philip de Orreby II nació en 1190, en Elford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Philip de Orreby I, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Emma de Coventry, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Leuca de Mohaut en 1217, en North Ormsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1230, en su pueblo, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultado en Elford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
